## Summary

Describe the problem and the change.

## Testing

List the checks run and any relevant synthetic test cases.

## Privacy and data review

- [ ] I used only synthetic data in code, tests, logs, screenshots, and this description.
- [ ] This change does not include customer exports, Customer Match files, personal information,
      credentials, or confidential business data.
- [ ] Any third-party data or content has documented provenance, redistribution rights, licence,
      and attribution.
- [ ] I considered whether this change alters data collection, network access, hashing, retention,
      or disclosure behaviour.

## Completion checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behaviour and pass locally.
- [ ] Linting passes.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when needed.
- [ ] No security vulnerability is being disclosed publicly; those reports follow
      [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
